name: slop
description: State Layer for Observable Programs — a protocol for AI to observe and interact with application state

scripts.build: (cd packages/typescript/core && bun run build) && (cd packages/typescript/consumer && bun run build) && for d in client server react vue solid angular tanstack-start openclaw-plugin; do (cd packages/typescript/$d && bun run build) || exit 1; done
scripts.test: for d in packages/typescript/*/; do if ls "$d"__tests__/*.test.* >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Testing $d" && (cd "$d" && bun test); fi; done
scripts.clean: for d in packages/typescript/*/; do (cd "$d" && rm -rf dist); done
